_about: R14-seed trace OVERLAY — heavy-capture trace block intended to be merged INTO a deployment base via `_extends` for an audit-grade run. NOT a full root on its own (no transport / state / providers); always `_extends` a `local.base.json` / `nats.base.json` and let this one's `trace:` win. Pick this overlay for: regulatory audit runs, post-incident replay capture, anything where you want every cost/tool/phase event durably on disk.
